artifacts.label: Alternative promoter grouping
artifacts.recommended_use: Explain transcript-level TSS interpretations collapsed to DNA-level promoter candidates.

artifacts.label: Promoter evidence matrix
artifacts.recommended_use: Inspect transcript support, TFBS, variant, repeat, and CUT&RUN-style interval evidence per promoter candidate.

artifacts.label: Isoform promoter comparison
artifacts.recommended_use: Compare common and promoter-group-specific evidence between TP73 isoform starts.

artifacts.label: Promoter expression evidence
artifacts.recommended_use: Connect promoter groups to downstream transcript/gene expression evidence without deciding the biological story.

artifacts.label: TFBS score-track SVG
artifacts.recommended_use: Show promoter-region score traces and compact JASPAR logos.

artifacts.label: TFBS similarity ranking
artifacts.recommended_use: Rank TF score-trace similarity against the selected anchor motif.
